name: ACCESS Newswire Inc.
business: ACCESS Newswire Inc. provides press release distribution and related communications services, including investor relations website hosting, data feeds, events and webcast offerings, and incident hotline subscriptions. Customers are primarily public corporate issuers and professional firms (investor and public relations firms), as well as private companies for news distribution and webcasting.
sellsTo: professional firms (investor and public relations firms)

exposures.sentence: For the year ended December 31, 2025, our press release distribution business contributed over 80% of overall revenue.
The success of our cloud-based software largely depends on our ability to provide reliable solutions to our customers.
